description: Testing UI elements including position, labels, colors and units

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check UI:
+ Position
+ Label of item 
+ Color
+ unit (item/ 件, person/人,time/回...)
expected_result: 2. Display correctly as designed

item_type: Check display of number items on page
description: Testing number display formatting for different value ranges and thresholds

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of item when item has value: 0
expected_result: Display correctly: "-" + unit (base on spec: 人, 個...)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of item when item has value: 999
expected_result: Display correctly: 999 + unit (base on spec: 人, 個...)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of item when item has value: 1000
expected_result: Display correctly as spec. Ex: 1000人

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of item when item has value from 10,000 to 99,999,999
expected_result: Display correctly as spec. Ex: 999,9万人

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of item when item has value from 1,000,000,000 to 9,999,999,999
expected_result: Display correctly as spec. Ex: 1,000億人

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of item when item has value # Min/Max value
expected_result: Display correctly as spec.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of item when item has value = Min/Max value
expected_result: Display correctly as spec.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display of item when item has value # threshold value

(Note: Threshold value is the value which defined to control displaying of item. This value is base on each spec)
expected_result: Display correctly as spec. (Ex: Display current value)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of item when item has value = threshold value
expected_result: Display threshold value correctly as spec

item_type: Check display of user list on page
description: Testing user list display with different number of users

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of list when has 0 user
expected_result: Not display user list (or display the text base on space)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of list when has 1 user only
expected_result: Display user list correctly as spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display of list when has less than N users

(Note: N is the value which defined to cotrol displaying of user list)
expected_result: Display user list correctly as spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of list when has N users
expected_result: Display user list correctly as spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of list when has more than N users
expected_result: Display user list with correct format as spec

item_type: Check statistic by the time value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check statistic by the minute
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check statistic by the  hour
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check statistic by the day
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check statistic by the  week
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check statistic by the month
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check statistic by the year
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

item_type: Check statistic by  specified time period.
description: Testing statistics display for various time periods and date ranges

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the display of chart when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in a day: From = To = Today
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the display of item change period From - To date value:
+ Data in a day: From = To # Today
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the display of item when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in a day: From = To = The oldest date in database
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the display of item when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in a week
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the display of item when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in a month
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the display of item when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in a year
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the display of item when change period From - To date value:
+ Data in special period: From last month to this month, from last year to this year

Ex: 15/6/2018 ~15/7/2018
01/01/2017~01/01/2018
expected_result: Display value correctly base on spec

item_type:
Check display incase block time is 1 minute (update every minutes)

(Note: After each block time unit, displaying of statitics value is updated)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Display when time is 0:00~0:01
expected_result: Display updated value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Display when time is 0:59~1:00
expected_result: Display updated value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Display when time is 23:59~24:00
expected_result: Display updated value correctly base on spec
Display updated value correctly base on spec

item_type: Check display incase block time is 1 time / day, at the specific time (HH:MM)
description: Testing daily updates at specific times

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display before HH: MM
expected_result: Display current value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display at HH: MM
expected_result: Display updated value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display after HH: MM
expected_result: Display updated value correctly base on spec

item_type:
Check display incase block time is X hours (every X hours)
 ( Base on spec. Example: X = 4h)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Display when time duration from 0:00 to 03:59 hours
expected_result: Display current value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Display when time duration from 0:00 to 4:00 hours
expected_result: Display updated value correctly base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint: Display when time duration from 0:00 to 4:01 hours
expected_result: Display updated value correctly base on spec

item_type:
Check realtime update
(Base on each spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check realtime update when increasing data for 1 item on DB
expected_result: Increase data value corresponding changed data

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check realtime update when Descreasing data for 1 item on DB
expected_result: Descrease data value corresponding changed data

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check realtime update when Change data for 1 item = 0/ NULL on DB
expected_result: Display value = 0 for changed data

item_type:
Change data not realtime
(Base on each spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check not realtime update when increasing data for 1 item on DB
expected_result: Just update displaying after reload  page

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check  not realtime update when Descreasing data for 1 item on DB
expected_result: Just update displaying after reload page

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check not realtime update when Change data for 1 item = 0/ NULL on DB
expected_result: Just update displaying after reload chart page

item_type:
Change item Real-time
(Base on each spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check realtime update when Delete one item on DB
expected_result: Deleted item is disappeared correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check realtime update when add more item on DB
expected_result: Added item is appeared correctly

item_type:
Change item not Real-time
(Base on each spec)

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check not realtime update when Delete one item on DB
expected_result: Just update displaying after reload  page

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check not realtime update when add more item on DB
expected_result: Just update displaying after reload page

description: Testing display properties of text area in both add and edit forms

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Add new form]
Check default display of Text area item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: blank
+ Place holder value
...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Edit form]
Check default display of Text area item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: DB's value

description: Testing text area control functionality including cursor, tab order and resizing

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check display of Cursor in text area
expected_result: Appear the cursor when focus into text area as normal

test_view_points.viewpoint: Click "Tab" key on keyboard to Check tab order of item
expected_result: Tab order is correct as designed

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation of text area when resized form
expected_result:
+ Text area has the resized icon (at the bottom right of form) 
+ User can resize text area form by drag on the resized icon and drop it.
+ Operation of text area is not effect after resized form

description: Testing text area with various valid input scenarios

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when not input value/multi spaces
expected_result: Success or failure base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when input valid character:
+ Only spaces
+ Number
+ English characters
+ Has Lower cases characters
+ Has Uper cases characters
+ Has half-width Japanese characters
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when input special valid character:
+ /n
+ /br
+ /r [in case use old version of MAC laptop]
+ Other symbol

Check when input special valid character:
+ Copy & Paste full-width Japanese characters
+ Input full-width Japanese characters

Check when has redundant spaces:
+ At the begin/end of string
+ Between string
+ Between lines

Check when input special valid character:
+ HTML characters
+ SQL injection
+ Programming languages

Check when input multi lines when:
+ Not display vertical scroll
+ Display vertical scroll
expected_result:
Process successfully with inputed value
Vertical scroll operates normally

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input Max/Mix value
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when input max valid value:
+ Without Enter character
+ Has Enter character
(includes all valid character types)
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

description: Testing text area with invalid input scenarios

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input < Min lenght value
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input > Max length value

description: Testing character count functionality with different input types

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check the number of remain character if not input data yet
expected_result: + The limited number of field displays correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check the number of remain character if input data into text area: 
+ Half-width Japanese characters
+ Full-width Japanese characters
+ English characters
+ Special symbol
+ Enter symbol
+ Max length
expected_result: + The remaining characters = Max length  - number of input characters
